texto: It has been said that when we pray, we speak to God; when we read, He speaks to us. Keeping this in mind, look for more in good books than entertainment. You will find in these books much that applies to you, and even in good novels, you will find many points that can help you become a finer person and a better Christian.
explicacao: Citação de William A. Carroll sobre temas ligados a fe. “It has been said that when we pray, we speak to God; when we read, He speaks to us. Keeping this …” articula fe, catholic-girls, good-books em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como good-books e good-character.
